case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. LIRIA SANTOS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100042772) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
